title: Levitation Core
description: Adds a Curios-compatible item that grants creative flight while equipped
body:
![The Ancient Artifact: The Core of Levitation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23ea9ba090840c689aebab92f9d2e28633c0d774.png)
# Levitation Core
Harness the power of ancient arcane energy.
The Core of Levitation grants true creative flight when equipped.
just pure, unrestricted freedom in the skies

Craft it, equip it, ascend. Swoosh.!

## The Ancient Artifact: The Core of Levitation
Long before the first block towers rose into the sky, there existed a force untouched by ground or weight. Scholars spoke of it as the space between all things — an unseen current flowing through the fabric of the world.

From this current, the Core of Levitation was formed.

No one knows how this artifact came into existence.
It is no ordinary object, but a condensed fragment of that ancient energy. It does not lift, nor does it carry — it releases. Those who bear it feel gravity loosen its hold, as if the world itself forgets to pull.

The Core demands nothing. It does not judge.
It simply exists — and allows. 

Or does it?

Feel the power of Anti-Gravity
The sky is no longer a destination.
It is a state of being.
